modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Users lost access to Adobe All Apps plan unexpectedly.

full_description_text: 
Hoy, todos en la oficina recibieron un correo de Adobe. Dice que el administrador de la Universidad de South Dakota ha quitado el acceso al plan de All Apps. No sabemos por qué pasó esto y necesitamos ayuda.
short_description: Users lost access to Adobe All Apps plan unexpectedly.
description: Hoy, todos en la oficina recibieron un correo de Adobe. Dice que el administrador de la Universidad de South Dakota ha quitado el acceso al plan de All Apps. No sabemos por qué pasó esto y necesitamos ayuda.
